s: In 1985, Brian Snyder suited up for SEA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 6.370, WHIP 1.780, SO 23, WAR 0.500.
Changed teams after the previous season (SEA -> OAK).
In 1989, Brian Snyder suited up for OAK as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 27.000, WHIP 6.000, SO 1, WAR -0.300. Notable context: Joined OAK.
